name: MSI MPG X670E CARBON WIFI E-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 2x PCIe 5.0 x16 - Support DDR5-6600+(OC) - 4x M.2 Slots - 2x USB 3.2 Gen2x2 Type-C - USB 3.2 Gen 2 10Gbps (Type-C Display port) - HDMI 2.1 - DP 1.4 - 2.5G LAN - 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6E (X670ECARBWIFI)
shortName: MSI MPG X670E CARBON WIFI E-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 2x PCIe
description: High-performance AMD AM5 E-ATX motherboard with dual PCIe 5.0 slots, DDR5, and premium networking for power users.
